name: E Pawn Jonesboro
description_short: ePawn is an Atlanta-based pawn shop chain offering in-store and online collateral loans on luxury items, jewelry, vehicles, and collectibles with no credit checks.
description_long:
ePawn operates as the largest independently owned pawn shop chain in the Atlanta metro area, with 8 physical locations serving the greater Atlanta region. The company has expanded its traditional in-store pawn business to include an online pawn portal, allowing customers across the country to obtain collateral loans remotely. ePawn accepts a wide variety of high-value assets including luxury watches, jewelry, vehicles, firearms, electronics, artwork, and rare collectibles, positioning itself as a resource for both routine pawns and high-value luxury transactions ranging from $1,000 to $1 million.

The company offers three core services: in-store pawns with claimed high payouts and low rates, online pawns through a remote application and shipping process, and buy/sell services. Their stated terms include a flat 25% monthly interest rate, no maximum loan term, no hidden fees, no credit checks, and flexible payment plans. Customers can either repay the loan plus interest to reclaim their item, extend the loan by paying monthly interest, or forfeit the item with no further obligation.

ePawn differentiates itself by emphasizing that it offers higher payouts than competitors and operates the largest independent pawn chain in Atlanta. The company highlights convenient physical locations for immediate service and an online option for remote customers. Their marketing targets both experienced pawn customers and first-time users, positioning themselves as an expert resource.

However, potential customers should note that the 25% monthly interest rate (300% annualized) is substantially higher than most alternative lending options and significantly exceeds the 36% APR ceiling for regulated consumer loans. The online process, while convenient, requires shipping items and involves evaluation delays. The website structure shows a 404 error on the About page, limiting available company information. For consumers with access to credit-building loans, personal loans, or credit union options, those alternatives would typically offer far better terms.
pros: No credit checks required—accessible to those with poor or no credit history
Wide range of accepted collateral including vehicles, jewelry, electronics, and luxury goods
Online pawn option allows remote customers nationwide to obtain quotes and complete transactions
No hidden fees—stated pricing is transparent (25% monthly interest)
8 convenient physical locations across Metro Atlanta for in-store service
Flexible repayment—customers can extend monthly or forfeit collateral without debt collection
High loan amounts available ($1K-$1M) for valuable items
cons: 25% monthly interest rate (300% annualized) is extremely high compared to personal loans, credit lines, and other alternatives
Online shipping process introduces delays and requires customer to arrange shipment of valuable items
Limited company transparency—About page returns 404 error; minimal background information available
Loss of asset risk—inability to repay results in forfeiture of personal property, not just debt consequences
Only serves Atlanta metro area for in-store locations; online option still relies on Atlanta-based evaluation
best_for: Customers with urgent cash needs and valuable collateral who lack access to traditional credit
Individuals selling or liquidating jewelry, watches, vehicles, or collectibles
First-time pawn users seeking guidance from experienced staff
High-net-worth individuals pawning luxury items ($10K+) as a liquidity strategy
diagnosis: ePawn is best for individuals who own valuable assets and need immediate cash without credit qualification. The critical caveat is that the 25% monthly interest rate (300% APR) far exceeds alternative lending options—customers should only consider pawn loans if traditional credit is genuinely unavailable and the asset is non-essential, since repayment failure results in permanent loss of the collateral item.
services: In-store collateral loans (pawn) with high payouts
Online pawn portal with remote evaluation and funding
Vehicle pawns (cars, ATVs, motorcycles, Big Rigs)
Jewelry and precious metals pawning (gold, silver, platinum, loose diamonds, luxury watches)
Electronics and high-tech asset pawns (drones, computers, tablets, high-end TVs, gaming consoles)
Fine art and collectibles pawning (vintage antiques, artwork, rare coins/currency)
Equipment and machinery pawns (power tools, riding lawnmowers, music equipment)
Buy and sell services for collateral items
Flexible repayment plans with no maximum term
